import string

let line_opt = io.read_line()
let line = match line_opt
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let n = string.len(line)
mut i = 0
mut have = false
mut neg = false
mut cur = 0
mut out = ""
mut first = true

while i < n
  let b_opt = string.byte_at(line, i)
  let b = match b_opt
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0

  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13 or b == 10
    if have

        v = -v

      let d = v * 2
      if first

      end

      neg = false

    neg = true
    have = true
  else if b == 43
    have = true

  end

end
